OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

CORELIGHT_INVESTIGATOR_API_BASE_URL.description: Corelight Investigator API base URL (region specific, e.g. https://eu.api.investigator.corelight.com).

CORELIGHT_INVESTIGATOR_API_KEY.description: Corelight Investigator API key (sent as an Authorization bearer header).

CORELIGHT_INVESTIGATOR_ALERTS_PATH.description: Path of the Investigator Detections and Alerts API endpoint.

CORELIGHT_INVESTIGATOR_IMPORT_WINDOW_DAY.description: Number of days to look back on the first run.

CORELIGHT_INVESTIGATOR_MAX_ALERTS.description: Maximum number of alerts to request per run.

CORELIGHT_INVESTIGATOR_TLP_LEVEL.description: Default TLP marking applied to the imported entities.

CORELIGHT_INVESTIGATOR_SSL_VERIFY.description: Whether to verify the API server TLS certificate.
